title: Thinking of Consolidating My 3 NAB Accounts (Classic, iSaver, Reward) – Looking for a 1-Bank Solution
body:
Hey everyone,
I’m currently with NAB and have three separate accounts:
- Classic transaction account
- iSaver savings account
- Reward credit card
I’m looking to consolidate these into a single bank for simplicity, but I don’t want to lose the key features I’ve grown to rely on. Specifically:
Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) Style Card: I really like the flexibility of NAB Now Pay Later (interest-free installments for purchases). Does any other bank offer a similar built-in BNPL feature on their credit/debit card, or is it mostly a separate app thing?
Savings Interest & Flexibility: I like the iSaver’s intro rate and the Reward Saver’s bonus interest structure. Are there other banks that offer competitive rates without locking you into strict deposit/withdrawal rules?
Rewards & Perks: NAB Goodies offers decent discounts (Hoyts, Expedia, etc.). Does switching mean losing out on a solid rewards ecosystem, or are there better alternatives out there?
Digital Features: I use the NAB app’s "Cash Prediction" and "Saving Spaces" a lot. Do other banks have similar AI-driven budgeting tools?
Cash Withdrawals: I frequently withdraw cash, so I’d prefer a bank with low or no ATM fees, especially for both domestic and international withdrawals. NAB charges $5 per overseas withdrawal and has specific limits; is there a better option for cash access?
Has anyone made a similar switch? Any recommendations for a bank that:
- Offers a BNPL-style card or easy installment feature
- Has a solid rewards program
- Provides competitive savings rates with flexibility
- Has a good mobile app with budgeting tools
- Keeps ATM fees low (especially for cash withdrawals)
Thanks in advance for any advice!
